summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of Scribe Board (infinite canvas PWA). Verified DOM presence of all 27 data-testids on first load. Pen drawing works end-to-end (empty-hint disappears after stroke; visible squiggle on canvas). Tool-active toggle works for tool buttons. Failed to trigger inline text-editor when clicking on stage with text tool selected — this is a real concern.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on an empty area of the Konva stage with tool-text active did not spawn the textarea[data-testid='text-editor'] (timeout). Pen drawing on the same canvas works fine, so canvas event wiring is OK in general — likely the synthetic mouse.click was too fast for handleStageMouseDown's text branch, OR the freshly-drawn Line shape (listening:false when tool!=select/eraser) is not the issue; need a manual repro. Repro: switch to tool-text, single click on empty area — text-editor should appear.

action_items: Manually verify text tool: switching to tool-text and single-clicking on stage must show the textarea (data-testid=text-editor). If it requires a mousedown+up with delay, consider also handling pointerdown or making it slightly more robust to fast synthetic clicks.

Consider also propagating data-testid down to the inner <canvas> element (currently it lands on the konvajs-content wrapper; the selector [data-testid='konva-stage'] canvas works only via descendant lookup which timed out once — using [data-testid='whiteboard-root'] canvas was reliable).
critical_code_review_comments: Whiteboard.jsx is ~1100 lines — consider splitting drawing handlers, history, save/load, and shape renderers into separate modules (>700 line guideline).

deleteSelected is referenced inside the keyboard useEffect but defined after the effect; works due to hoisted closure but the effect dep array doesn't include it (eslint-disable used). Wrap in useCallback and include in deps.
useEffect for paste/drop has eslint-disable on deps — addImageAtCenter is captured stale; convert to useCallback to avoid stale stagePos/size.
Stage's data-testid prop is passed to react-konva wrapper div but the actual <canvas> has no testid; add data-testid on the wrapping div around Stage so tests can target the visible canvas reliably.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27 data-testids verified present on initial load (whiteboard-root, empty-hint, dot-grid, bottom-toolbar, all tool-* buttons including tool-image and tool-screen-capture, open-color-picker, btn-undo/redo/save/load/clear/zoom-in/out/reset, zoom-display, image-file-input, board-load-input). Pen drawing simulated via page.mouse.down/move/up on [data-testid='whiteboard-root'] canvas DOES draw a stroke and removes empty-hint. Selector [data-testid='konva-stage'] canvas timed out once — prefer [data-testid='whiteboard-root'] canvas. The text-tool spawn of textarea was not observed in headless run — needs re-verification (might just be event timing). Save/Load/Clear/Zoom/Selection flows were partially blocked by the text-tool failure aborting the script; main agent should self-test those quickly.
